humaaans

Change the hairdos, tops, and pants.

Design the
humaaan body.

Rotate and position the elements in your humaaans however you like. They're like legos made out of flesh... and vectors.

Demo made with InVision Studio

Illustrations for every occasion.

Add life to your empty, error, or success states.

Make your landing pages look dope!

Design your family's beerday invitations.

Maybe a tattoo? No judgement ;)

Make a Sceeene.

Add a bit of ambience to your content.

Start with a template.

We are humaaan
after all.
